article.p: MetaOWL provides useForm() — a declarative hook for building validated forms with async submission support.

h2.style: font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--doc-heading-color); margin-top: 32px; margin-bottom: 16px;

pre.style: padding: 16px; border-radius: 8px; overflow-x: auto; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 24px;
padding: 16px; border-radius: 8px; overflow-x: auto; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 24px;
pre.code:
<templates> <t t-name="LoginPage"> <form t-on-submit.prevent="submitHandler"> <input t-model="form.fields.email" type="email" placeholder="E-Mail" /> <span t-if="form.errors.email" t-esc="form.errors.email" class="error"/>
<input t-model="form.fields.password" type="password" placeholder="Password" /> <span t-if="form.errors.password" t-esc="form.errors.password" class="error"/>
<button type="submit" t-att-disabled="form.isSubmitting"> <t t-if="form.isSubmitting">Loading...</t> <t t-else="">Login</t> </button> </form> </t> </templates>

h2.style: font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--doc-heading-color); margin-top: 32px; margin-bottom: 16px;

article.p: The validators helper provides ready-to-use validator functions for field validation:

tr.td: Must be a valid email address

h2.style: font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--doc-heading-color); margin-top: 32px; margin-bottom: 16px;

article.p: useForm() returns a reactive form instance with the following properties and methods:

pre.style: padding: 16px; border-radius: 8px; overflow-x: auto; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 24px;
pre.code:
// Reactive state form.fields // Current field values (reactive object) form.errors // Validation errors by field (null = no error) form.touched // Per-field touched state form.dirty // Per-field dirty state form.isSubmitting // true while handleSubmit callback is running form.isValid // true if all errors are null form.isDirty // true if any field has changed from default form.isTouched // true if any field has been touched
// Methods form.handleSubmit(fn) // Create submit handler with validation form.setValue('field', value) // Update a single field value form.setTouched('field') // Mark a field as touched form.setAllTouched() // Mark all fields as touched form.validateField('field') // Validate a single field (async) form.validate() // Validate all fields (async) form.reset() // Reset to default values form.register('field') // Get bindable input props

h2.style: font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--doc-heading-color); margin-top: 32px; margin-bottom: 16px;

article.p: Set initial field values using the default property per field:

pre.style: padding: 16px; border-radius: 8px; overflow-x: auto; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 24px;

h2.style: font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--doc-heading-color); margin-top: 32px; margin-bottom: 16px;

article.p: This form demonstrates all useForm() features: validation, error handling, form state tracking, and async submission. Open the browser console to see logged data when interacting with the form.

div.class: bg-gray-100 dark:bg-[#1e202e] border border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-700 rounded-lg p-6 mb-8

label.class: block font-medium text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300 mb-1.5 text-sm

input.class: w-full px-3 py-2.5 text-sm bg-white dark:bg-gray-800 text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-100 border border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600 rounded-md placeholder-gray-400 dark:placeholder-gray-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 dark:focus:ring-blue-400

label.class: block font-medium text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300 mb-1.5 text-sm

input.class: w-full px-3 py-2.5 text-sm bg-white dark:bg-gray-800 text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-100 border border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600 rounded-md placeholder-gray-400 dark:placeholder-gray-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 dark:focus:ring-blue-400

button.class: px-5 py-2.5 bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 disabled:opacity-60 disabled:cursor-not-allowed text-white text-sm font-medium rounded-md transition-colors cursor-pointer

div.class: p-2 bg-white dark:bg-gray-800 rounded border border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700
p-2 bg-white dark:bg-gray-800 rounded border border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700
p-2 bg-white dark:bg-gray-800 rounded border border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700

pre.class: bg-gray-200 dark:bg-gray-900 text-gray-800 dark:text-gray-200 rounded-md p-3 text-xs overflow-x-auto
bg-gray-200 dark:bg-gray-900 text-gray-800 dark:text-gray-200 rounded-md p-3 text-xs overflow-x-auto

button.class: px-3.5 py-2 bg-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-600 dark:bg-gray-600 dark:hover:bg-gray-500 text-white text-xs rounded-md transition-colors cursor-pointer
px-3.5 py-2 bg-violet-600 hover:bg-violet-700 text-white text-xs rounded-md transition-colors cursor-pointer
px-3.5 py-2 bg-red-500 hover:bg-red-600 text-white text-xs rounded-md transition-colors cursor-pointer
